themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 9 verses. Commentary leans on "John Chrysostom on HOMILIES ON GENESIS 62.24: Let us therefore make this our concern too, to...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶצְלִ֖י: with me - a side; (as a preposition) near".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And his master saw that the LORD was with him, and that the LORD made all that he did to pros...". Word-study detail reinforces "עֹשֶׂ֔ה: made all that he did - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And Joseph's master took him, and put him into the prison, a place where the king's prisoners...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ: where the king's - a king".
